name: small business owners using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 employees tool
description: For small business owners using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 employees, manual entry of employee hours causes payroll inaccuracies. We provide a timesheet aggregator instead of manual timesheet tracking and entry into QuickBooks.
target_audience: small business owners using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 employees
problem_solved: manual entry of employee hours leading to payroll inaccuracies

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual entry of employee hours leading to payroll inaccuracies
